title: Add Nano Banana property images to the landing page

requirements.summary: Integrate curated Nano Banana property images into HeroSection, FeaturesSection, and AboutSection, replacing existing placeholder imagery with new assets from frontend/public/assets/generated
acceptanceCriteria: New images from Nano Banana are displayed in at least the HeroSection and one other section (e.g., FeaturesSection or AboutSection).
Images are stored as static assets under frontend/public/assets/generated.
Images match the warm terracotta/earth-tone visual style of the site.
All images load correctly and are properly sized for their respective sections.
No broken image links or missing asset references exist after the update.

file_operations.description: Replace the existing background image URL with the new hero image frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-nano-banana.dim_1920x1080.png to display a warm-toned aerial or street-level view of colonial-style residential buildings with terracotta rooftops and lush greenery in Querétaro style.

Update the four feature cards to display the generated Nano Banana images: frontend/public/assets/generated/feature-accommodations.dim_800x600.png for Premium Accommodations (elegant furnished living room), frontend/public/assets/generated/feature-locations.dim_800x600.png for Prime Locations (charming cobblestone street), frontend/public/assets/generated/feature-service.dim_800x600.png for Trusted Service (welcoming handshake scene), and frontend/public/assets/generated/feature-personalized.dim_800x600.png for Personalized Experience (happy family on terrace). Ensure images are properly sized and maintain the existing card layout structure.

Replace the existing about-us-image.jpg with frontend/public/assets/generated/about-team.dim_900x700.png showing a warm portrait-style photo of a professional real estate team in front of a colonial building. Maintain the current two-column grid layout and ensure the image displays properly alongside the company description and trust indicators.
